Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ 为眼科医生及英意科研团队研发的临床护眼配方，结合两大强效抗氧化成分 Pycnogenol® 法国松树皮与 Mirtoselect® 欧洲蓝莓，并添加柑橘类黄酮，有助改善眼部微循环、支持健康眼压、对抗用眼压力与氧化损伤，缓解眼睛干涩、疲劳与模糊感，让视力更清晰、更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ascen resources ITOH Sugabloc
programme.desc: A daily blood sugar support supplement from Japan’s ITOH Kanpo. With 4 natural herbal ingredients working together, it helps slow down sugar absorption and reduce post-meal spikes. By keeping glucose levels more stable, it supports better energy, weight control, and heart health—so you can enjoy your meals without worrying about sudden sugar highs. 来自日本井藤汉方的日常控糖配方，结合4大天然草本成分，帮助减缓糖分吸收，稳定餐后血糖。让血糖不再忽高忽低，减少饭后疲倦，同时有助体重管理和心血管健康。让你在享受美食的同时，也能更安心地管理血糖。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion
programme.desc: A lightweight 4.5 kg cushion that turns any seat into a personal massage chair. Dual rollers on a full-length track relax from neck to hips and improve circulation. Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear. 护膝提供膝盖周围稳固支撑与轻柔加压，分担关节压力，减少磨损。结合日本生化能技术与托玛琳微热作用，促进血气循环、舒缓僵硬, 让膝盖在日常走动、运动中都保持稳定与健康， 降低磨损和退化风险。 透气材质，天天戴都舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Kampo Premium Cordyceps & Bitter Melon Triple Cleanse
programme.desc: The bitter melon formula supports natural detoxification, helps balance blood sugar, and promotes healthy metabolism. The cordyceps capsules boost energy, nourish blood health, and strengthen immunity. Carefully formulated with selected herbal extracts and GMP-certified, these supplements are ideal for daily wellness and long-term natural health maintenance. Health+ 日本汉方苦瓜三清素帮你清热解毒、平衡血糖、促进代谢，Health+ 日本汉方至尊虫草胶囊补气养血、提升免疫力和精力。精选草本精华，GMP认证，天天养生也安心，长期调理体质更自然健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - I-Running X-Fold Exercise Bike
programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions. I-Running X-Fold折叠运动脚踏车，设计时尚小巧，配有舒适座垫、可调阻力和LCD显示屏，支持手机App连接，适合家庭健身使用。其折叠设计节省空间便于收纳，帮助您在家轻松进行有氧运动，保持体能、身形和肌肉量。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Detox
programme.desc: Feel light, clean, and energized with Kinohimitsu Detox, specially curated for TWS by experts— a trio of Bio-Booster, Detox Enzyme, and Footox. Boost nutrient absorption, ease digestion, and flush out toxins naturally. Ease the constipation and cleansing your body, easy for you to create a daily routine for total wellness. Kinohimitsu 轻盈排毒组专家专为TWS精心打造的轻盈排毒组，让您感觉轻盈、洁净、充满活力——它包含Bio-Booster、Detox Enzyme 和Footox 3项好评排毒保健品。有助于促进营养吸收，促进消化，并自然排出毒素。缓解便秘，净化身体，让您轻松建立维护全面健康的日常习惯。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Comvita Honey
programme.desc: Comvita™ 10+ Manuka Honey is a premium honey from New Zealand that supports immunity and aids digestion. Collagen Peptide Manuka Honey Drink supports skin, joint, and bone health while boosting hydration and elasticity. Night Rejuvenating Manuka Honey is the world’s first honey designed to protect the liver with rejuvenating properties that provides detoxification while you sleep. Comvita™ 10+ 麦卢卡蜂蜜是来自新西兰的优质蜂蜜，因其抗菌特性而闻名。它有助于增强免疫力，缓解喉咙痛，并促进消化。胶原蛋白肽麦芦卡蜂蜜饮品有助于皮肤、关节和骨骼健康，同时改善皮肤水分和弹性。刺梨朝鲜蓟麦芦卡蜂蜜饮品是全球首款设计用于保护肝脏的蜂蜜，结合了麦卢卡蜂蜜的益处和修复特性，支持整体健康和帮助睡眠时排毒。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Revival Shampoo
programme.desc: A breakthrough 4-in-1 formula that colors, nourishes, volumizes, and strengthens hair—while improving scalp health in just 5 days. Powered by Korean patented polyphenol technology, it offers safe, natural grey coverage without harsh chemicals, leaving hair darker, fuller, and healthier with every wash. Ellixi发量黑洗发水，采用颠覆性的4合1配方：洗头同时染发、护发、增发量并强韧发丝，仅需5天即可改善头皮与发质。采用韩国专利多酚技术，无需染发剂或化学添加，温和自然遮盖白发。结合多酚氧化着色原理与草本养护成分，让秀发一洗更黑、更丰盈、更健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker
programme.desc: La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker This La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker provides you with the best of both worlds by combining a hot pot and grill in one appliance. Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you’re simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables! 这款La Gourmet 火焰电饭锅将火锅和烧烤炉结合一体。为您提供两全其美的享受。无论您是煮汤还是烧烤肉类和蔬菜，都能享受多功能的膳食准备！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Mobot Opula Lite 4 Wheels Mobility Scooter
programme.desc: The most sleek lightweight 18kg four-wheel mobility scooter that is foldable and for overseas traveling. 18公斤四轮电动代步车，时尚轻巧可折叠，方便带出国！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Kampo CholesGuard
programme.desc: A premium, natural supplement trusted globally for over 20 years. It helps to manage cholesterol to a healthy level by combining Red Yeast Rice (Monacolin K) with high-activity Nattokinase. Enhanced with Dan Shen and Wild Yam, it helps to support vessel elasticity and reduces heart workload. It is toxin-free and safe for long-term daily use. You could claim a full refund if you do not see results in 30 days. 一款享誉全球20余年的优质天然保健品。它结合了红曲（莫纳可林K）和高活性纳豆激酶，有助于将胆固醇维持在健康水平。添加丹参和野生山药，有助于增强血管弹性，减轻心脏负担。本产品不含毒素，可长期服用，安全可靠。提供30天安心保证，如30天后未见效，全额退款。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Furi Knife Bundle Set
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives! 厨房刀片如同专业大厨一般娴熟！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Omron Knee TENS
programme.desc: The OMRON Knee TENS is a drug-free, non-invasive device designed to relieve knee pain and stiffness using clinically proven TENS technology. Compact and easy to use, it delivers gentle electrical pulses that stimulate nerves and improve blood circulation, helping to reduce pain from arthritis, injury, or overuse. With customizable intensity levels and ideal for daily use at home or on the go. OMRON 膝盖电疗仪是一款非药物、非侵入式的膝部护理设备，采用微电流技术TENS，有效缓解膝盖疼痛与僵硬感。产品轻巧易用，通过温和电脉冲刺激神经、促进血液循环，帮助缓解因关节炎、运动伤害或过度使用引起的不适。多段强度可调，贴合膝盖设计，提供精准、舒适的护理体验。

programme.title: Mill Of The Stone Women
programme.desc: In 19th century Holland, a professor of fine arts and an unlicensed surgeon run a secret lab where the professor's ill daughter receives blood-transfusions from kidnapped female victims who posthumously become macabre art.

programme.title: Sandokan: Pirate of Malaysia
programme.desc: Filmed in Singapore it tells the story of Sandokan who is a Malaysian rebel who, with a group of renegades, goes up against a British General who is trying to force the King to resign.

programme.title: If You Meet Sartana... Pray for Your Death
programme.desc: After a stagecoach is robbed and the passengers murdered, a long and tangled series of surprise attacks a murderous double-crosses leaves the coach’s strongbox in the hands of the killer Lasky. It is up to the legendary hero Sartana to track down the missing money and determine just who is ultimately behind the grisly robberies and killings.

programme.title: Alive Or Preferably Dead
programme.desc: Two brothers, Monty and Ted, will inherit $300,000 if they manage to live together for six months.

programme.title: Bloody Friday
programme.desc: After escaping from a courtroom during his trial, a major criminal plans the biggest bank robbery ever to have taken place in the country.

programme.title: The Grasshopper
programme.desc: Christine Adams leaves her small town in British Columbia at age 19 to follow her boyfriend to L.A., where he works for a bank. She soon gets bored and moves to Las Vegas and becomes a showgirl, eventually slipping into prostitution.

programme.title: Alive Or Preferably Dead
programme.desc: Two brothers, Monty and Ted, will inherit $300,000 if they manage to live together for six months.

programme.title: Chomel
programme.desc: After her mother's death, Mimi's family fell apart. One day, Mimi finds Chomel, a cat and brings it home, only for it to cause a series of events that brings her broken family back together again.

programme.title: My Future Husband
programme.desc: Emily berharap untuk menemui bakal suami dan pada suatu hari muncul seorang lelaki bernama Atta yang mengaku dia adalah suami Emily dari masa hadapan.

programme.title: Perangkap Perkahwinan
programme.desc: Three best friends promised to get married, at the same time when they turn 26 years old. Their perceptions of marriage life begin to change and conflict ensues.

programme.title: Cik Puan Sinderella
programme.desc: This is a lighthearted family drama about a teenage girl who is closely guarded by her mother.

programme.title: Jatuh Cinta Buta
programme.desc: Telefilem komedi romantik tentang perkenalan singkat di antara Zulin, seorang gadis yang tidak pernah bercinta, dengan Izlan, seorang duda dalam satu 'blind date' yang diaturkan oleh Nadya Ramanshah.

programme.title: Matahari
programme.desc: Fauzi seorang guru yang telah dihantar untuk berkhidmat di Sabah. Di sana dia telah berkenalan dengan seorang novelis yang sedang mengalami masalah ‘writer’s block’ iaitu Yazid.

programme.title: Meniti Cinta Di Starimost
programme.desc: Iman dipaksa berkahwin dengan Qaseh, anak kepada orang gajinya untuk mewarisi harta bapanya. Percutian mereka di Bosnia membuahkan bibit-bibit cinta. Lakonan Iqram Dinzly, Zarina Zainoordin dan Yana Shamsudin.

programme.title: Jula Juli Bintang Putus Cinta
programme.desc: Telemovie sekuel Jula Juli Bintang Cinta kini kembali! Kali ini, Jula dan Juli mengalami konflik percintaan dengan Dani & Izham sehingga mereka memutuskan untuk berpisah dan melarikan diri ke kampung Juli.

programme.title: Kampung Kuala Lambat
programme.desc: Kampung Kuala Lambat bagai mengalami sumpahan apabila lelaki yang berkahwin muda akan mati di hari pernikahan mereka namun kejadian ganjil ini tidak berlaku kepada lelaki yang berusia 60 tahun ke atas.

programme.title: Musnahkan Pelamin Anganku
programme.desc: Mikael yang merupakan seorang wedding planner menerima tawaran besar untuk menjayakan sebuah majlis perkahwinan pelanggannya. Namun majlis perkahwinan tersebut merupakan majlis bekas isterinya.

programme.title: Dua
programme.desc: Kisah Farhan yang kehilangan kembarnya Fahrin dalam satu kemalangan tragis. Dia kemudiannya mengambil-alih kehidupan Fahrin namun terperangkap dalam sebuah cinta tiga segi pula. Lakonan Eusoff Hashim dan Sharifah Sakinah.

programme.title: Racun Menantu
programme.desc: After marrying Zain, Sara lived in the same house with Pak Dolah, her father-in-law. Because of the family's grudge, Sara started making trouble by seducing her own father-in-law.

programme.title: Cupid
programme.desc: Kisah mengenai seorang ejen yang bekerja di sebuah syarikat penghancur jodoh yang ditugaskan untuk memikat seorang wanita supaya dapat melupakan suaminya yang telah diisytiharkan meninggal dunia. Namun dia jatuh cinta pada wanita tersebut

programme.title: Cerai
programme.desc: Pengalaman berkurung dengan pasangan selama musim PKP memaksa dua pasangan suami isteri menilai semula perkahwinan mereka yang telah disalah ertikan selama ini.

NatureFarm's碧容健®，源自法国滨海松树皮萃取物，是一款高效天然抗氧化营养品。经过160项临床试验与450篇科学研究验证，全面帮助抵御氧化压力，守护大脑、眼睛、心脏、关节、肌肤及血糖健康，适合各年龄层日常保健

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - [24 Bottles] Kinohimitsu Bird's Nest Red Dates & Wolfberry + Bird's Nest Chinese Ginseng
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu Bird’s Nest is hand-picked and traditionally brewed to enhance beauty, boost vitality, and restore energy. The Ginseng Bird’s Nest relieves fatigue, while the Red Date & Goji Berry version promotes a radiant complexion Kinohimitsu燕窝采用纯手工挑毛与古法炖煮，营养丰富，助美容养颜、增强体质、恢复活力。长白山人参燕窝饮补气强身、缓解疲劳；红枣枸杞燕窝饮促进气血循环，令肌肤红润透亮.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Probiotic
programme.desc: Thomson ProbioGut is a premium probiotic supplement designed to support digestive health, boost immunity, and promote overall well-being. Formulated with two clinically researched Japanese probiotic strains—it helps improve gut flora, regulate bowel movements, and maintain a healthy body weight. Thomson ProbioGut 是一款优质的益生菌补充剂，专为支持消化健康、增强免疫力和促进整体健康而设计。采用两种临床研究认证的日本益生菌菌株— 有助于改善肠道菌群、调节排便，并维持健康的体重

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Yi Shi Yuan Tiger Milk Lung Cleanse
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung's health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds. 忆思源虎乳芝净肺宝 由忆思源医药顾问团队专为维护呼吸系统健康、增强免疫力与日常保养而调配的独家配方。采用虎乳芝、冬虫夏草、石斛，三种珍贵药材；帮您先调理、后保健，有助于补肺气、维持肺部健康。适合咳嗽、鼻子过敏、反复感冒、长期曝露在空污环境的朋友服用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion
programme.desc: A lightweight 4.5 kg cushion that turns any seat into a personal massage chair. Dual rollers on a full-length track relax from neck to hips and improve circulation. Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Jujube Essence & Mulberry Puree
programme.desc: Health+ Jujube Essence & Mulberry Puree are crafted as pure juices with no sugar, no water, and no preservatives. Each sachet delivers natural nourishment anytime, anywhere. Jujube helps boost energy, support immunity, improve sleep, and enhance women’s wellness, while mulberry provides rich antioxidants, improves eyes health, and promotes radiant skin. Health+ 红枣原汁 + 桑葚原浆采用纯果汁制作，不加糖、不加水、无防腐剂。每一小包都能随时随地为你补充天然营养。红枣有助提升气血、增强免疫力、改善睡眠、呵护女性健康；桑葚则富含抗氧化成分，有助护眼、促进皮肤亮泽，全面提升你的状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Q’SAI Knee Supporter Collagen
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills. Q’SAI 膝之助胶原蛋白粉 QSAI 护膝胶原蛋白粉，截至2024年1月累计销量已超过5000万盒，富含高吸收性的胶原蛋白肽、玻尿酸和软骨素，有助滋养关节和软骨、缓解关节疼痛。其无味无臭的粉末状配方，可轻松加入任何食物或饮料中服用，是日常关节护理的理想之选，尤其适合那些不想服用药片的人士。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Krill Oil 180s
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2™ krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health. Nature's Farm来自南极的磷虾油，富含优质Omega-3脂肪酸和虾红素, 有助于维持胆固醇水平、维护心 脏、大脑和关节健康！ 人体对磷虾油的吸收率更高，没有难闻的鱼腥味，软胶囊更容易吞服，一天2颗有助于维护整体健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker
programme.desc: La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker This La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker provides you with the best of both worlds by combining a hot pot and grill in one appliance. Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you’re simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables! 这款La Gourmet 火焰电饭锅将火锅和烧烤炉结合一体。为您提供两全其美的享受。无论您是煮汤还是烧烤肉类和蔬菜，都能享受多功能的膳食准备！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Mirtogenol Plus+
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ is a clinically tested eye health formula developed by ophthalmologists and scientists from the UK and Italy. Powered by two powerful antioxidants—Pycnogenol® and Mirtoselect®—with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision. Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ 为眼科医生及英意科研团队研发的临床护眼配方，结合两大强效抗氧化成分 Pycnogenol® 法国松树皮与 Mirtoselect® 欧洲蓝莓，并添加柑橘类黄酮，有助改善眼部微循环、支持健康眼压、对抗用眼压力与氧化损伤，缓解眼睛干涩、疲劳与模糊感，让视力更清晰、更舒适。

programme.desc: For the elimination challenge, the contestants go to Maggie Beer's Eatery.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Bread Box Challenge & Re-invention Test
programme.desc: The contestants arrive back at the kitchen after a week of adventure in South Australia.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Alla Wolf-Tasker's Autumn Harvest
programme.desc: Hoda, Sarah and Lisa wake in the house for what may be the last time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Immunity Challenge: Andy Harmer
programme.desc: Contestants arrive at the kitchen, each determined to take home a coveted immunity pin.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Dandenong Ranges Team Challenge
programme.desc: The 12 MasterChef contestants arrive in the hills of the Dandenong Ranges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - World Cuisine Elimination Challenge and Second Chance Cook-Off
programme.desc: Ready to face a challenge they know will see one of them eliminated.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Adriano Zumbo's Mystery Box Challenge & Croquembouche Invention Test
programme.desc: The judges reveal this is Sweet Week.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Katherine Sabbath's Birthday Cake
programme.desc: The contestants are ready to fight for their place in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Immunity Challenge: Alice Wright
programme.desc: Our two Sweet Week mystery box winners and the winning team from Zumbo's invention test compete for immunity over two rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Restaurant Takeover Team Challenge
programme.desc: George pays a surprise visit to the Masterchef contestant house with a special guest. Together, they reveal the challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Chocolate Wheel Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team from the previous challenge will fight for their place in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Mystery Box Challenge & Royalty Cooking Challenge
programme.desc: For the mystery box challenge, the contestants find a big surprise among their ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Pressure Test: Saransh Goila
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test face elimination in a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Immunity Challenge: Ashley Davis
programme.desc: The mystery box winner and the top three contestants from the invention test compete for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Royal Reception Catering Team Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants receive a surprise message in the Masterchef house which informs them of their next group challenge and where they'll be travelling to.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Nitmiluk National Park Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Continuing their adventure, the contestants arrive at their next destination. The two losing teams from the previous challenge face elimination in this challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Mini Box Challenge & Condiment Invention Test
programme.desc: It's survival week and the contestants will be cooking for their lives every day.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - TV Dinner Re-Invention Cook-Off
programme.desc: As survival week continues, the contestants are shocked to discover that another challenge may lead to elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Time or Ingredients Cook-Off
programme.desc: The contestants remaining in survival week will learn all about making decisions under pressure as they decide what is of more value to them: time or ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 10 - Panama Dining Room Service Challenge
programme.desc: The challenge is off-site at Panama Dining Room, in Melbourne's inner-city suburb of Fitzroy.

programme.title: Sekolah Api

programme.title: Balapan
programme.desc: Kisah empat orang remaja yang telah menjadi musuh sejak sekian lama di lapangan balapan acara pecut 100meter peringkat daerah Selangor dan akhirnya menjadi sahabat seperjuangan.

programme.title: Lampu Merah
programme.desc: Si lelaki sukakan si perempuan, tanpa sedar yang si perempuan itu psiko dan obses dengan cintanya. Cara untuk selamatkan diri hanya dengan jatuh cinta dengan si perempuan semula.

programme.title: Bini Aku Dari...

programme.title: Tebus

programme.title: Survival 486
programme.desc: Syuhada going hiking to Gunung Tahan with her friends. Unfortunately, she got lost and fell into a deep hole and trapped there for 19 days.

programme.title: Cik Paris Diva Kampung

programme.title: Budak Dari Tak Bai

programme.title: Delen
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Delen yang mula rasa terancam apabila Emily mula menyukai pelajar baru bernama Robert. Sejak itu, bermulalah persaingan antara Delen dan Robert demi merebut cinta Emily.

programme.title: Bro Jenin
programme.desc: Kisah Jenin yang telah masuk ke zaman kini. Dia berjumpa dengan seorang animator, Emily. Wujud perbezaan pendapat maka terjadi lah kisah2 lucu dan akhirnya Jenin terpaksa pulang ke tempat asalnya.
